creator: ludovic@hirlimann.net
text:
Created attachment 240823
Patch removing reference to this README file.

When installing beats8 the post install shows :
```
[1/1] Extracting beats8-8.6.2: 100%
=====
Message from beats8-8.6.2:

--
The modules.d and monitors.d files are now installed into
/usr/local/share/examples/beats

See README file in /usr/local/etc/beats for respective beat information.

See UPDATING file in ports top level directory for list of breaking changes.
[vagrant@freebsd13 ~]$ vi /usr/local/etc/beats/README
```

But `/usr/local/etc/beats` doesn't contain any README file.
